svg.title: Pipeline 1 — Intent lifecycle
svg.desc: Chi tiết từng bước của intent pipeline từ create đến archive.

g.text: match intent.title + type vs active goals criteria
exit 0 = pass · exit 1 = out-of-goal → human decides
human reviews intent draft in Dashboard

svg.text: no auto-approve even if align passes
creates git branch if not exists

g.text: Copilot suggests · human approves · kbx apply
kbx intent stage <id> when done → status=staged

svg.text: exit 1 on any kbx apply → fix first

g.text: exit 1 → back to step 5 with error report
emit signals → signal bus → dashboard refresh
intent archived · next cycle begins (or idles)
